title: Gaurav Rana launches boutique corporate & competition law firm Rana & Partners
description: Gaurav Rana, formerly a Partner at Indo Legal Services, has announced the launch of his boutique law firm, Rana & Partners, headquartered in New Delhi.Rana & Partners will provide specialized counsel in corporate and competition law. Its core practice areas include arbitration, insolvency proceedings, mergers and acquisitions, and comprehensive operations and management advisory.
